title: Racing the Beam
creator: Nick Montfort and Ian Bogost
description: A platform study of the Atari VCS that connects hardware architecture to the visual and mechanical techniques used by cartridge developers.
useful: A strong introduction to understanding creative work through the capabilities and limits of a platform.
audience: Programmers, historians, and designers studying the relationship between hardware and creative form.
learning: Understand the Atari VCS as a design constraint
Connect hardware behavior to visible game techniques
Read individual games as responses to a platform
